heading: Special pay: service as member of Weapons of Mass Destruction Civil Support Team
label: 305b Special pay: service as member of Weapons of Mass Destruction Civil Support Team

children.heading: .—Special Pay Authorized
children.label: a .—Special Pay Authorized
children.text: The Secretary of a military department may pay special pay under this subsection to members of an armed force under the jurisdiction of the Secretary who are entitled to basic pay under section 204 and are assigned by orders to duty as members of a Weapons of Mass Destruction Civil Support Team if the Secretary determines that the payment of such special pay is needed to address recruitment or retention concerns in that armed force.

children.heading: .—Monthly Rate
children.label: b .—Monthly Rate
children.text: The monthly rate of special pay under subsection (a) may not exceed $150.

children.heading: .—Inclusion of Reserve Component Members Performing Inactive Duty Training
children.label: c .—Inclusion of Reserve Component Members Performing Inactive Duty Training

children.text: To the extent funds are made available to carry out this subsection, the Secretary of a military department may pay the special pay under subsection (a) to members of a reserve component of the armed forces who are entitled to compensation under and who perform duty under orders as members of a Weapons of Mass Destruction Civil Support Team.section 206 of this title

The amount of the special pay for a member referred to in paragraph (1) shall be equal to ⁄ of the monthly special pay rate in effect under subsection (b) for each day on which the member performs duty under orders as members of a Weapons of Mass Destruction Civil Support Team.130

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: d .—Regulations
children.text: Special pay under this section shall be provided in accordance with regulations prescribed by the Secretary of Defense.

children.heading: .—Definition
children.label: e .—Definition
children.text: In this section, the term “Weapons of Mass Destruction Civil Support Team” means a team of members of the reserve components of the armed forces that is established under in support of emergency preparedness programs to prepare for or to respond to any emergency involving the use of a weapon of mass destruction.section 12310(c) of title 10
